message:
refactor(pager,vfs): extract eviction policy state and simplify VFS I/O paths

Page cache (crates/fsqlite-pager/src/page_cache.rs):
- Remove inline PageCacheEvictionPolicy, EvictionQueuesSnapshot, and
  PageCacheEvictionState structs — these have been relocated to the
  dedicated s3_fifo module for cleaner separation of concerns
- Simplifies page_cache.rs to focus on core cache operations

VFS unix + uring (crates/fsqlite-vfs/):
- unix.rs: Simplify file descriptor management and I/O operations
- uring.rs: Minor cleanup of io_uring submission paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
